name: Editorial

raw.justification: Generic dark navy SaaS template. 6-card feature grid, stats section, no photography. Does not resemble editorial references at all.

harnessed.justification: Editorial magazine pacing, oversized display typography, black/white palette, asymmetric layouts. Recognizably editorial. Weakened by rounded card containers, image placeholders, and slightly dense 'Selected Looks' section.

knownIssues: Rounded corners on containers despite sharp corner directive
Image placeholders instead of actual photography
Mobile layout broken — text overflow, collapsed sections
Selected Looks section still slightly card-grid-ish
